translations.en: Sentri
translations.zh: 桑特里
translations.note: NPC name，可加入隊伍的武士，發音 'Sahn-tray'

translations.en: a handsome warrior.
translations.zh: 一位英俊的武士。

translations.en: "Good $T, $P. I hope you have returned to ask me to join you."
translations.zh: 「$T好，$P。希望你回來是要邀我同行的。」

translations.en: "$P! You have come at last!"
translations.zh: 「$P！你終於來了！」

translations.en: "It is I, Sentri." (He pronounces his name 'Sahn-tray.')
translations.zh: 「正是在下，桑特里。」（他將自己的名字發音為「桑—特雷」。）

translations.en: "I have been waiting here for you."*
translations.zh: 「我一直在此等候你。」*

translations.en: "I heard you had @returned, and knew you would come here eventually."
translations.zh: 「我聽說你@returned回來了，知道你遲早會來這裡。」

translations.en: "Britannia needs your help now more than ever before."
translations.zh: 「不列顛尼亞比以往任何時候都更需要你的幫助。」

translations.en: "Many have set out to fight the @gargoyles already."
translations.zh: 「已有許多人出發去與@gargoyles魔像作戰了。」

translations.en: "Not just the town guards, but any able bodied men that could be spared from their work."
translations.zh: 「不只是城鎮守衛，還有任何能從工作中抽身的壯年男子。」

translations.en: "The battle goes poorly. But now that you are here, there is hope. I stand ready to @join you."
translations.zh: 「戰況不佳。但如今你來了，便有了希望。我隨時準備@join加入你。」

translations.en: "If you should pass this way again, I will be here. I await but the opportunity to @join you."
translations.zh: 「若你再次路過此地，我便在此。我只等待@join加入你的機會。」

translations.en: "I beg your pardon, could you repeat that?"
translations.zh: 「抱歉，能再說一遍嗎？」

translations.en: "I have joined you already!"
translations.zh: 「我已經加入你了！」

translations.en: "Shall I join your party?"
translations.zh: 「我加入你的隊伍嗎？」

translations.en: "I bow to your wisdom. If you have need of me later, you have but to ask."
translations.zh: 「我敬服你的判斷。若日後有需要，開口就行。」

translations.en: "It would be best if you got out of that vessel first."
translations.zh: 「最好先離開那艘船。」

translations.en: "You have enough companions now."
translations.zh: 「你現在同伴已經夠多了。」

translations.en: "If you tell one of them to @leave first, then I'll join you."
translations.zh: 「若你叫其中一人先@leave離開，我就加入你。」

translations.en: "So be it. Now that we are together, surely the realm will be saved."
translations.zh: 「就這樣決定了。如今我們同在，王國必能得救。」

translations.en: "Has the time come when your plans call for me to wait in reserve?"
translations.zh: 「你的計畫是否需要我暫時待命？」

translations.en: "Then let's be on about our mission!"
translations.zh: 「那就出發執行任務吧！」

translations.en: "Let's get our feet back on solid ground first, okay?"
translations.zh: 「先讓我們踩回堅實的地面，好嗎？」

translations.en: "Then I shall go wait at Serpent's Hold until you need me again."
translations.zh: 「那麼我去巨蛇堡等候，直到你再次需要我。」

translations.en: "I'd best leave you my equpiment in case you need it on your quest."
translations.zh: 「我最好把裝備留給你，以防你在任務中用得上。」
translations.note: 原文 equpiment 拼字錯誤，照原文翻譯

translator_notes: 桑特里是忠誠的老朋友武士，熱切盼望加入隊伍、為不列顛尼亞效力。語氣正式帶英雄氣概，與聖者重逢的喜悅清晰可感。發音注記「Sahn-tray」保留於正文中。
